_comment: Pre-registered 2026-06-24 BEFORE the SPNCR-003 ladder run, per RESEARCH_PROTOCOL.md. Data: intraday_prices 15m, real RELIANCE candles 2026-03-17..2026-06-23 (64 sessions). These ranges may not be changed after testing begins. NOTE: gap-up days are a subset of sessions, so per-window trade counts will be small; small n is an honesty flag, recorded not hidden.
